user.title: Solar Irrigation — Location & Zones
user.description: Enter your garden location (defaults to your HA home location). Buildings and zone geometry are configured later via the Lovelace card.

data.name: Installation name
data.north_offset: North offset (degrees, 0 = map Y axis points North)

zone.title: Solar Irrigation — Zone {zone_index} of {total_zones}
zone.description: Configure irrigation zone {zone_index}. Zone geometry (polygon) is drawn later in the Lovelace card.

et0.title: Solar Irrigation — ET0 Source
et0.description: Select how to obtain the daily reference evapotranspiration (ET0).

data.irradiance_weighted: Weight by solar irradiance (sin²·⁵ elevation) — more physically accurate

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON format. Please check the syntax.

init.title: Solar Irrigation — Settings
init.description: Zones and buildings can also be edited as JSON here for advanced users.
